headline: A form has feelings now.
subhead: This dispatch is legally binding in the emotional sense only.
bulletins: Your inbox is drizzling passive-aggression with a 60% chance of 'circling back.'
Reminder: sighs must be filed in triplicate.
Approval stamp deployed with theatrical confidence.
Stapler has been promoted to manager (against everyone's wishes).

feature.name: Mood Stamp
feature.description: A different stamp design appears today. It does nothing, but it judges you.
